payload.author: claude
payload.body: Repo was already public (briannadoubt/Trust). This session: pushed feat/cargo-trust-wrapper (18 commits), opened PR #1 (https://github.com/briannadoubt/Trust/pull/1), CI workflow runs on it — first run (through the launch-batch commit) PASSED on GitHub; final commit's run in progress. Remaining definition-of-done judgment: CI green on the final push + merging the PR (bri's call alongside RT-58 publish timing).
